data.description: Dreamland Limited finalizes $18M equity purchase deal.

data.title: ParaZero signs distribution deal with top Western European distributor to access NATO markets for defense solutions._STRONGREACH.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Kfar Saba, Israel, ParaZero Technologies Ltd. (Nasdaq: PRZO), a company focusing on aerospace defense, revealed a new partnership. This partnership entails a distribution agreement with a prominent Distributor from Western Europe. The Distributor is known for its expertise in advanced defense systems and force training solutions. ParaZero is recognized for its innovative autonomous solutions for both manned and unmanned aerial systems within the global industry. The collaboration aims to enhance the reach and availability of ParaZero's cutting-edge technologies across Western Europe.

data.title: Abaxx to introduce Enwex UK Onshore Wind Futures on Dec 12, 2025, expanding suite of weather-indexed benchmarks in global power markets.
data.description: The introduction of this new benchmark is part of a developing range of weather-indexed benchmarks, aimed at aiding hedging and risk management in power markets worldwide.

data.title: Saudi Arabia launches "Saudi Properties" platform ahead of Non-Saudi Property Ownership Law to manage real estate ownership.
data.description: In Riyadh, Saudi Arabia, on December 5, 2025, the Real Estate General Authority (REGA) unveiled the introduction of a national platform called "Saudi Properties." This platform will be the designated official hub for all real estate ownership matters in the country.

data.title: Mural Oncology's acquisition by XRA 5 Corp. under Chapter 1 of Companies Act 2014 becomes effective on 5 December 2025.
data.description: Mural Oncology, based in Waltham, Mass. and Dublin, has been acquired by XRA 5 Corp., a subsidiary of XOMA Royalty Corporation, as officially announced on Dec. 5, 2025. The acquisition was made through a scheme of arrangement under Chapter 1 of Part 9 of the Companies Act 2014. This agreement involves XRA 5 Corp. acquiring all the shares of Mural. The acquisition officially came into effect on the stated date, marking a significant development in the business world. Mural Oncology is listed on Nasdaq under the ticker symbol MURA, while XOMA Royalty is listed under Nasdaq as XOMA.

data.title: SL Green closes $1.3 billion Opportunistic Debt Fund, with additional investment capacity through sidecar structures and separate accounts.
data.description: SL Green Realty Corp, the largest office landlord in Manhattan, revealed the completion of its SLG Opportunistic Debt Fund. The Fund secured over $1.3 billion in total capital commitments. The company also mentioned the availability of extra investment opportunities through sidecar structures and discretionary separate accounts.

data.title: Solana WET presale compromised by Sybil wallets as HumidiFi delays launch. CEO warns of increasing Sybil attacks, urges KYC or detection tech.
data.description: CEO Nick Vaiman of Bubblemaps highlighted the increasing occurrences of Sybil attacks within presales and airdrops. He emphasized the importance for teams to implement KYC processes or algorithmic detection methods to combat this issue effectively.

data.title: Ethereum options traders are more bullish than Bitcoin ones, with data revealing higher optimism amid recent upgrades.
data.description: Following recent network upgrades and improving macro uncertainty, data on options trading indicates that traders are exhibiting less bearish sentiment towards Ethereum compared to Bitcoin. This suggests a shift in market perception towards Ethereum, with a more positive outlook on its performance. These observations are reflected in the numbers, with a decreasing number of bearish positions taken by traders in the Ethereum market compared to the Bitcoin market.

data.title: Bitcoin continues above $90,000. $289.05 million liquidated in 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs saw $194.6 million outflows, Ethereum ETFs $41.6 million. Support at $84,400 critical amid market weakness.
data.description: Bitcoin maintains its position above $90,000 amidst ongoing market weakness, with $289.05 million in liquidations recorded in the past 24 hours. Bitcoin ETFs experienced net outflows of $194.6 million on Thursday, while Ethereum ETFs saw net outflows of $41.6 million. Notably, around 300,648 BTC were accumulated at $84,400, establishing a significant support level, according to crypto chart analyst Ali Martinez. Analyst Michael van de Poppe noted Bitcoin's stagnant performance within a specific price range, lacking clear directional momentum. Any potential breakdown from this range could result in... data.title: TomaGold amends agreement with SOQUEM regarding Chibougamau Properties; includes David, Radar, Dufault, Williams, Brosman, McKenzie, and Bruneau properties.
data.description: In Montreal, Tomagold Corporation (TSXV: LOT; OTCPK: TOGOF) has recently entered into an amendment to a mineral property option agreement dated August 11, 2023 with SOQUEM Inc. The agreement pertains to various properties including David, Radar, Dufault, Williams, Brosman, McKenzie, and Bruneau. The company and SOQUEM have mutually agreed to amend the agreement. This amendment involves modifications to the anniversary date for Year ____.

data.title: FirstEnergy Transmission, LLC offers exchange for 4.750% Senior Notes due 2033. Subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp. operates in five states.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Fairmont, West Virginia, FirstEnergy Transmission, LLC (FET), a subsidiary of FirstEnergy Corp. (NYSE: FE), which oversees electric transmission operations in Ohio, Pennsylvania, West Virginia, Maryland, and Virginia, made an announcement.
China: Actively advancing anti-drug cooperation with the US - CCTV

data.title: Lone Star sells SPX FLOW to ITT Inc. for $4.775 billion - leading provider of industrial equipment and process tech.
data.description: A deal has been finalized by Lone Star Funds to sell SPX FLOW, a top supplier of specialized equipment for various markets, to ITT Inc. for $4.775 billion in cash and stock. SPX FLOW, headquartered in Charlotte, N.C., caters to industrial, health, and nutrition sectors with advanced technology solutions. The agreement was made through an affiliate of Lone Star Fund XI, LP and marks a significant transaction in the market.

data.title: Stock Yards Bancorp named to 2025 Sm-All Stars list by Piper Sandler for small-cap banks, ranking among top performers nationwide.
data.description: A regional community bank has been identified as one of the top performers nationwide by analysts at Piper Sandler. This recognition highlights the bank's exceptional performance and success within the industry. The bank's ranking among the top performers underscores its strong financial position and effective business strategies. This achievement showcases the bank's commitment to excellence and highlights its standing within the competitive banking sector. It is a testament to the bank's dedication to providing quality services and its ability to thrive in the current economic environment. This accolade solidifies the bank's reputation and emphasizes its position as a leading financial institution in the region.

data.title: Realbotix names Scott Meyers as new CFO, effective Jan 12, 2026, with 22+ yrs experience in finance.
data.description: A new Chief Financial Officer, Scott Meyers, has been appointed by Realbotix Corp. (TSX-V: XBOT) (Frankfurt: 76M0.F) (OTC: XBOTF), a top player in AI-powered humanoid robots. Meyers, taking on the role from January 12, 2026, has a wealth of knowledge in corporate finance and public-company reporting across various countries, including Canada and the USA. With over 22 years of experience, Meyers also has a track record of scaling technology-driven companies.

data.title: Taiwan's data center market analysis: Major players, Taipei with 100MW+ capacity, 85% capacity shared by top companies.
data.description: ResearchAndMarkets.com has recently introduced the "Taiwan Existing & Upcoming Data Center Portfolio" database. According to the database, Chunghwa Telecom, Chief Telecom, Vantage Data Centers, and Taiwan Mobile make up about 85% of Taiwan's operational data center capacity. Taipei serves as the main hub for current data center projects in the country, boasting over 100 MW+ capacity. Furthermore, approximately 75% of Taiwan's upcoming data center capacity is centralized in Taipei.

data.title: Intensity Therapeutics, Inc. granted 180-day extension by Nasdaq to meet bid price requirement. Nasdaq symbol: INTS.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, in Shelton, Connecticut, Intensity Therapeutics, Inc. (Nasdaq: INTS), a prominent late-stage clinical biotechnology firm, announced its dedication to discovering and developing innovative intratumoral cancer treatments. The company is focused on creating therapies that can effectively eradicate tumors.

data.title: NextEra Energy's investor conference on Dec 8 in NY; to be held from 8:30am to 11:30am ET. Talking about future plans.
data.description: On December 5, 2025, Juno Beach-based NextEra Energy, Inc. (NYSE: NEE) revealed plans to hold an investor conference on December 8, 2025, in New York City from 8:30 a.m. to 11:30 a.m. ET. During the conference, senior executives from the company will engage in discussions...
